message:
feat(build): add BuildSession state machine for autonomous builds

Implement the BuildSession state machine for tracking autonomous build execution:

- BuildPhase enum with phase transitions (SearchSessions → QualityFilter →
  ExtractPatterns → FilterPatterns → Synthesize → Complete/Failed)
- QualityGates for build validation thresholds
- BuildState for persistent, resumable build state
- Progress calculation using phase weights
- Checkpoint support for long-running builds
- Duration parsing for --duration flag (e.g., "4h", "30m", "2h30m")

New CLI flags added:
- --duration: Set autonomous build duration
- --checkpoint-interval: Set checkpoint save interval
- --resume: Resume a previous build session
- --with-cm: Seed build with cass-memory context

Part of autonomous build mode (meta_skill-vc3).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
